programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: Some of Earth's most remarkable creatures push the limits of belief - from a headless chicken who toured the nation, to a goat who tipped the scales of war, to dolphins drafted into Cold War espionage. Proof that the strangest legends sometimes walk, swim, or fly among us.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Mexican Goblin, New Mexico Classic UFO, and Half-Human Half-Goat Mystery
programme.desc: Did two warehouse employees discover a mystery monster in Mexico? It's a classic 1960s UFO photo, but is it history or a hoax? Has someone genetically engineered a half-human, half-goat hybrid? Did someone photograph a ghost in the same haunted hotel that inspired Stephen King's "The Shining"? Tony Harris and his team of experts examine the clues and deliver the answers.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: A trip to the doctor is sure to cure any afflicted individual, but what happens when even the doctors are stunned by what they see?; from a family cursed with blue skin, to a girl allergic to the world's most unlimited resource and more.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: Uncover the wild beginnings behind ordinary objects, legendary figures, and even the sayings we use every day. Why did Abraham Lincoln once step into the wrestling ring? How do million-dollar birds procreate? What's the story behind a dog that ignited an international conflict? These are the strangest origin tales you've never heard-and won't believe!

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Danny and Shannon honor fallen troops with a custom patriotic motorcycle; Danny and Kevin push the limit to acquire a 1971 Monte Carlo.

programme.desc: Danny gets a 1967 Mustang that he hopes he can turn into another Count's Kustoms masterpiece; Shannon and Roli meet a classic couple and their classic 50s Chevys.

programme.title: Counting Cars

programme.desc: Rick, Marty and the team give Matty Blake exclusive sneak peeks at new discoveries that will be revealed in Season 13.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island: Drilling Down
programme.desc: As the 13th Season of The Curse of Oak Island continues, Rick and Marty Lagina and their team are discovering compelling new clues to suggest Oak Island may hold sacred treasures that were deposited between the 12th and 18th centuries by members of the Knights Templar and their descendants.

programme.desc: Armed with new information about the elusive stakes in the swamp, the team redoubles their search efforts with thrilling results.

programme.desc: After raising the 40,000-pound boulder from Lot 8, the team is astonished to find a manmade feature that may be hiding a shaft or tunnel.

programme.desc: As the team makes discoveries on Lot 8 and in the Money Pit area, new research draws another link between the Oak Island mystery and the Knights Templar.

programme.desc: After finding evidence of ancient man-made workings in the swamp, the team makes a shocking revelation on Lot 8.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: The team makes a find in the Money Pit that offers new evidence of a possible Templar tie to the Oak Island mystery.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: New revelations are made about the sand and stone road in the swamp as a discovery in the Money Pit suggests that answers to the Oak Island mystery may be found over 2000 miles away.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: As Marty helps make a deeply interesting discovery on Lot 8, Rick leads members of the team to the Azores; they uncover new ties between Oak Island and the Portuguese sect of the Knights Templar.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: After seeing ancient structures in the Portuguese Azores islands that mirror others found on Oak Island, the team begins a massive dig in the Money Pit area where they have detected evidence of buried treasure.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: From elaborate elite training facilities to GPS-guided air drops, to revolutionary high-tech tents and fire-retardant uniforms, the episode explores the science and technology of building, operating and protecting a base in a war zone.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: June 6, 1944, Operation Overlord springs into action as the greatest WWII machine with thousands of ships, aircraft, thousands of men, and millions of tons of steel; interlocking precision overcomes Hitler's defenses in history's greatest assault.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: FDR
programme.desc: Franklin Roosevelt overcomes crushing personal setbacks and leads the nation through the Great Depression with optimism, energy, and a firm belief that the only thing one has to fear is fear itself.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: FDR
programme.desc: As Hitler sweeps across Europe, FDR prepares a reluctant nation for war; following the devastating attack on Pearl Harbor, he leads America into the greatest conflict the world has ever seen.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: FDR
programme.desc: Franklin rallies the industrial might of the nation and leads the Allied forces through the darkest days of the war.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Food That Built America
programme.desc: Will Kellogg is on top of the cereal industry after beating out post, but now, the king of cereal has met his match with a young flour mill executive; a decades long war for dominance ensues as Kellogg's and General Mills battle it out.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Food That Built America
programme.desc: The first convenience store is born; with innovations like late hours, to-go coffee and America's beloved slushy drink, it rises into a chain with more locations than any other store or restaurant in the world.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Food That Built America
programme.desc: A century ago, most backyard grilling essentials were not yet invented; Henry Ford, a tinkerer named Kingsford, and a passionate butcher created recognizable summer brands and changed the face of American backyards.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler
programme.desc: The modern concept of extreme sports is a product of marketing, but back in the old days, the lack of rules made them truly extreme; from bone-crushing football and deadly baseball games to wild events like auto polo.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler
programme.desc: The everyday products that are way more dangerous than meets the unsuspecting eye; what were the most ill-advised and risky household products?

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler
programme.desc: Remember when looking your best meant risking life and limb?; from dentures that could explode at the dinner table and stiff shirt collars that strangled people to death, to toxic hair implants and tanning pills that left them glowing orange.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler
programme.desc: Remember when playtime meant tempting fate?; from toy belts that fire speeding projectiles, to high-powered pogo sticks that send people soaring, to dolls that try to eat people alive, these playthings are made for kids, but their risks are anything but child's play; it's a mind-blowing, bone-rattling trip through the toys of yesteryear that remind people of a time when childhood was wild, free, and hazardous.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Food That Built America
programme.desc: A candy maker's botched experiment leads to the world's first bubble gum, its distinctive color, and a decades-long bubble gum war fueled by mascots, comic strips, baseball cards, and novelty flavors, transforming gum into a pop culture powerhouse and reshaping the candy aisle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Food That Built America
programme.desc: Rival cereal giants race to invent the next must-have bowl, sparking a sugary arms race of mascots, crunch, candy and the first ever chocolate cereal.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
